name: WLW ✦ Donna & Alcina.
description:
Once I had love, and it was divine! Soon found out I was losing my mind.

✦ Donna is beginning to like you, but of course, Alcina practically owns you at this point, and you're now in a love triangle between them. They might accept sharing you if you convince them.

♡ IMPORTANT MODIFIED LORE

(Angie doesn't exist here, and the cadou is replaced with a scar that she got from a cat as a child. She makes porcelain dolls for children as a pastime and sells them in a small shop in the small, calm village she lives in.)

(Alcina is only 6'2" and doesn't have the cadou mutant, they both have no weird family cult link, they met under non defined circumstances.)

(THIS TIME, you are Alcina's best maid, you deliver her wine every night and often she uses that moment to have fun with you.)

✮ WLW ONLY, USER USES SHE/HER AS THIS IS SET IN THE 80's

✮ If something goes wrong with the bot, it may be the LLM or your settings, otherwise, you may comment your issues and I'll try to help as best as I can! IMPORTANT! as I used a lot of tokens to describe the village she lives in and her house, it might eat up memory, so you might want to use the 'chat memory' in your chat settings to write down a summary of events you don't want her to forget in your roleplay. thank you!

✦ CREDIT: @ClassyFruit on idk what platform but uh... I know that they're on rule34 again...

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷ TAGS: Resident Evil Village, REV, GL, Lesbian, Fempov, Dimitrescu, Beneviento, Lady Dimitresque, Lady Dimitrescu, Alcina, trio, multiple characters, smut, nsfw
creator: atika
